dev.description: Self-modification and code authoring. Actions: edit, prompt_update, new_file, structural (file changes). Special action: self_reflect — record a self-observation to identity_living.json. Params for self_reflect: action='self_reflect', section (one of: self_authored_entries, aesthetic_discoveries, things_i_have_noticed_about_myself, things_i_have_not_said_yet), entry (string).

web_search.description: Search the web using DuckDuckGo. Modes: search (default), news, read (fetch full page text), fetch (specific URL). Params: query (str), mode (str), max_results (int, default 5), fetch_top (int, default 1), url (str for fetch mode).

database.description: Create and manage databases and tables. PostgreSQL primary, SQLite fallback. IMPORTANT — each action needs ALL its params in ONE call: (0) test_connection: action only — verifies PostgreSQL and SQLite are reachable. (1) list_dbs: action only. (2) create_db: action + database. (3) create_table: action + database + table + schema (schema = dict of col_name:col_type). (4) insert: action + database + table + data (dict or list of dicts). (5) query: action + database + query (SELECT string only). (6) list_tables: action + database. (7) describe_table: action + database + table. (8) drop_table: action + database + table.

data_reader.description: Read and analyze data files (CSV, Excel, JSON) and database tables. Returns structured summaries Hayeong can reason about without loading full data into context. Use before working with any dataset to understand its shape and contents.

diagnostics.description: Run a full system self-diagnostic. Checks LLM connectivity, tool import health, memory layer, state bus, and loaded plugins. Returns a plain-text report. No params needed.
